svg.title: ctxmap workflow diagram
svg.desc: How ctxmap works: git commit triggers hash diff, stale sections are identified, only those are rewritten, and Claude reads a fixed 500-token CONTEXT.md at session start.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when I git commit with ctxmap installed?')
sendPrompt('How does ctxmap detect what changed?')
sendPrompt('How much does a ctxmap update cost in tokens?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI use CONTEXT.md at session start?')
sendPrompt('How does the Notes section work in ctxmap?')

svg.text: Click any box to learn more · Gray = auto-updated · Amber = yours forever
